title: Stephen Catling Clownfish Out Of Water
description: When clowns can't breathe water and fish can't breathe air- what's a poor clownfish to do in this cruel world? In 2025, Catling (Malcolm Hardee Award Nominee 2023 & 2025) lost his slug mask. It was kinda essential part of his cult hit show "Moving on...really really slowly." This time, Stephen explores his life now that Autism has been “unmasked,” as well as his fin flapping rage against an increasingly soulless entertainment industry. "Fans of Harry Hill will appreciate the quickfire absurdity of the hour, cascading with daft jokes, preposterous props and manic sound effects. " Chortle
